purpose: Deploy the already accepted TAI public intelligence P0 web image from exact main commit 24277e008d25f66f52b56284ff83ca3eead39fb2 to the canonical REG.RU VPS through a hardened key-only deployment authority with bounded DNS, SSH authentication, exact OCI, live-marker evidence, automatic web-only rollback and an auditable completion signal.
forbiddenCapabilities: deployment of any Git revision other than 24277e008d25f66f52b56284ff83ca3eead39fb2
password-based SSH transport or secret disclosure
mutation of API, database, Caddy, Compose configuration, environment, volumes or networks
restart of PostgreSQL, Redis, MinIO, Caddy or any non-web service
destructive rollback or database schema rollback
use of Netlify or Vercel as production or release evidence

claiming TAI or government adapters are operationally attested
